name: Tomato-Crowned Cod
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fish in an oiled baking dish.
2. Season with lemon juice and pepper.
3. Arrange the tomato slices on top of the fish.
4. Sprinkle the fillets with green pepper and onion.
5. In a small bowl, combine bread crumbs, basil and oil.
6. Spread the crumb mixture evenly over the tomatoes.
7. Bake uncovered in a preheated 350°F oven for 25 minutes.
